LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC., RASIER, LLC AND RASIER-CA, LLC'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER - IN LIGHT OF PLAINTIFF MEDINA'S 1,200 DISCOVERY REQUESTS IN THIS MOTOR-VEHICLE COLLISION CASE, THE UBER DEFENDANTS MOVE FOR A PROTECTIVE ORDER. UBER'S COUNSEL'S DECLARATION REVEALS THE ABSENCE OF A GOOD FAITH EFFORT TO RESOLVE THE MATTER. THUS, LEAD COUNSEL FOR UBER AND MEDINA ARE TO MEET IN-PERSON, FACE-TO-FACE FOR A MINIMUM OF 90 MINUTES.
